label: Display Name
expected: Text input read by _saveSettings → updateProfile displayName + users/{uid}.displayName; also updates #userName in header.

label: Company
expected: Text input; placeholder only — NOT read by _saveSettings (company info lives in the Company tab instead).
notes: Possible dead field — _saveSettings only persists name/calcom/digest/dormant.

label: Phone
expected: Text input; placeholder only — not read by _saveSettings.

label: Role (Owner/Operator…)
expected: 5-option role select; not read by _saveSettings — display only.
notes: Options: Owner/Operator, Sales Rep, Project Manager, Estimator, Other.

label: License #
expected: Text input; placeholder only — not read by _saveSettings.

label: Cal.com username
expected: On input, nbdSettingsUpdateCalcomPreview rebuilds cal.com/<user> preview link live; on Save, normalized (lowercase, strip @/slashes, 60 chars) → users/{uid}.calcomUsername.

label: cal.com/<username> preview link
expected: Hidden anchor revealed by nbdSettingsUpdateCalcomPreview; opens cal.com/<username> in new tab.
notes: display:none until a username is typed.

label: Send me dormant-lead reminders
expected: Checkbox read by _saveSettings → users/{uid}.dormantNudgeEnabled boolean; dormantLeadNudge cron skips on === false.

label: Export Leads (CSV)
expected: exportLeadsCsv (data-export.js) serializes in-memory leads cache to CSV and triggers a browser download.

label: Export Estimates (CSV)
expected: exportEstimatesCsv → exportEstimates (data-export.js): serializes in-memory estimates to CSV download.

label: Import Leads (CSV)
expected: openLeadImport → openImport (data-import.js): opens CSV import modal; rows deduped via LeadDedup before write.
notes: Opens import modal; data-writing happens inside the modal flow.

label: Secondary Toolbar
expected: data-on-change nbdSetCrmSecHeaderEnabledT → setCrmSecHeaderEnabled; shows/hides the CRM secondary quick-nav toolbar + toast.

label: Card Density: Compact / Comfortable / Spacious
expected: setKanbanDensity(arg) sets <html data-density>, writes localStorage KANBAN_DENSITY_KEY, repaints active button. Representative of the 3-button group.
notes: 3 buttons (compact/comfortable/spacious) — same handler with different data-arg. Key: localStorage KANBAN_DENSITY_KEY.

label: Bold Name & Value
expected: data-on-change nbdSetKanbanBoldHierarchyT → setKanbanBoldHierarchy; promotes lead name + dollar value in kanban cards + toast.

label: Auto-collapse header on scroll
expected: data-on-change nbdSetCrmAutoCollapseT → setCrmAutoCollapse; tightens header during column scroll/drag + toast.

label: Ask Joe AI · API Key
expected: Password input holding sk-ant-... key; consumed by saveJoeKeyFromSettings.

label: Save Key
expected: saveJoeKeyFromSettings (ai.js): persists the Anthropic API key (localStorage) and updates #joeKeyStatus.

label: Clear (API key)
expected: clearJoeKey (ai.js:42): removes stored Anthropic key and clears status.

label: 🧪 Load Sample Data
expected: loadSampleData (dashboard-bootstrap.module.js:1970): writes ~13 demo leads into the user's pipeline.
notes: Danger Zone panel; writes data but additive (not destructive).

label: Sign Out
expected: data-action signOut: Firebase signOut and redirect to login.
notes: Danger Zone; session-ending but not destructive of data.

label: ⚙️ Auto
expected: nbdSetModePref('auto') → ThemeEngine.setModePref; follows device prefers-color-scheme + toast.

label: Theme category filter chips
expected: JS-rendered category chips; clicking re-renders #te-theme-grid filtered to that category (_teRenderSettingsGrid).
notes: Dynamically populated by theme engine; repeats per category. One representative row.

label: Visual Overlays
expected: data-on-change nbdOverlaysSetEnabled → ThemeOverlays.setEnabled; toggles decorative overlays + toast.

label: Ambient Sound
expected: data-on-change nbdSoundsSetEnabled → ThemeSounds.setEnabled; toggles ambient audio + toast.

label: Hide decorative emojis (Professional Mode)
expected: data-on-change toggleProfessionalMode: adds/removes body.professional-mode, writes/removes localStorage nbd_professional_mode='1' + toast.

label: Enable GX Effects
expected: data-on-change nbdGxSetEnabled → ThemeGX.setEnabled; master glow/animation layer on/off + toast.

label: Glow borders on cards & panels
expected: data-on-change nbdGxSetGlow → ThemeGX.setGlow; toggles glow borders + toast.

label: Animated gradient background
expected: data-on-change nbdGxSetAnimatedBg → ThemeGX.setAnimatedBg; toggles animated bg + toast.

label: Glow Intensity slider
expected: data-on-input nbdGxSetIntensityFromSlider: ThemeGX.setIntensity(val/100) and updates #gxIntensityVal label (0-100%).

label: Custom Accent Color (GX)
expected: data-on-change nbdGxSetAccent → ThemeGX.setAccent(color); overrides accent color live + toast.

label: Reset to Default (accent)
expected: clearAccentTheme (dashboard-actions.js:209): clears the custom GX accent override and restores theme default.

label: Achievement Themes (unlock list)
expected: JS-rendered achievement-theme cards; locked ones show progress, unlocked ones apply the special theme on click.
notes: Dynamically populated; gated by achievement unlock state. One representative row.

label: Builder · Accent Color
expected: data-on-change applyCustomTheme: sets --orange CSS var live (and GX accent if active).
notes: One of 6 builder color pickers, all data-fn=applyCustomTheme.

label: Builder · Background
expected: data-on-change applyCustomTheme: sets --bg and --s (sidebar) + body background live.

label: Builder · Surface (Cards)
expected: data-on-change applyCustomTheme: sets --s2/--s3 surface vars live.

label: Builder · Text Color
expected: data-on-change applyCustomTheme: sets --t text var live.

label: Builder · Muted Text
expected: data-on-change applyCustomTheme: sets --m muted var live.

label: Builder · Border
expected: data-on-change applyCustomTheme: sets --br border var live.

label: Builder · Theme Name
expected: Text input (max 30) read by saveCustomTheme as the saved theme's name.

label: Save Theme
expected: saveCustomTheme: serializes 6 colors + name to localStorage nbd_custom_theme + toast.

label: Reset to Default (builder)
expected: resetCustomTheme: removes localStorage nbd_custom_theme, clears CSS vars, restores default picker values + toast.

label: UI Size: Compact/Default/Comfortable/Large
expected: nbdSetSize(arg): applies scale attrs, writes localStorage nbd_ui_size, repaints active size btn + toast. Representative of the 4-button group.
notes: 4 buttons compact/default/comfortable/large — same handler. Key: localStorage nbd_ui_size.

label: Font Family card (per font)
expected: JS-rendered font grid (nbdRenderFontGrid); clicking applies that font family app-wide and persists the choice.
notes: 28 font cards dynamically rendered — one representative row.

label: Sidebar item toggle (per nav item)
expected: JS-rendered checkbox grid (dashboard-sidebar-customizer.js); toggling shows/hides that sidebar nav item and persists the layout.
notes: Repeats per sidebar item — one representative row.

label: Reset to Default (sidebar)
expected: resetSidebarCustomizer (dashboard-sidebar-customizer.js:66): restores default sidebar item visibility.

label: Good Tier ($/SQ)
expected: Number input read by _saveEstimateDefaultsV2 → patch.tierRates.good (per-SQ price for Good tier).

label: Best Tier ($/SQ)
expected: Number input → patch.tierRates.best in _saveEstimateDefaultsV2.

label: Good Cost ($/SQ)
expected: Number input → patch.costBasis.good (internal cost basis).
notes: Internal cost basis — drives margin calc.

label: Better Cost ($/SQ)
expected: Number input → patch.costBasis.better.

label: Best Cost ($/SQ)
expected: Number input → patch.costBasis.best.

label: Minimum Job Charge
expected: Number input → patch.minJobCharge (floor applied to per-SQ totals).

label: Round To Nearest ($)
expected: Number input → patch.roundTo (rounding granularity for grand total).

label: Material Markup %
expected: Number input → patch.materialMarkupPct (value/100) for line-item mode.

label: Overhead %
expected: Number input → patch.overheadPct (value/100).

label: Profit %
expected: Number input → patch.profitPct (value/100).

label: Default Pitch
expected: Pitch select (4/12…14/12); default measurement preset for new estimates (read by V2 defaults).
notes: Default 8/12. Not in the explicit patch map at 3007 — verify it persists.

label: Default Waste %
expected: Number input — default waste factor for new estimates.
notes: Not in _saveEstimateDefaultsV2 patch map — verify persistence path.

label: Default Deck Replace %
expected: Number input — default deck-replacement percentage for new estimates.

label: Dump Fee ($)
expected: Number input → patch.dumpFee in _saveEstimateDefaultsV2.

label: Extra Layer Tear-Off ($/SQ)
expected: Number input → patch.tearOffExtraPerSq.

label: Fallback Tax Rate %
expected: Number input → patch.fallbackTaxRate (value/100); used when county tax unknown.

label: Permit cost — Hamilton County, OH (repeats x7)
expected: Number input → patch.permits['hamilton-oh'] {name,cost} in _saveEstimateDefaultsV2; auto-fills permit line by estimate county. Representative of 7 county permit inputs.
notes: 7 inputs: permHamOh/permButOh/permWarOh/permCleOh/permKenKy/permBooKy/permCamKy — same handler keyed by permMap. One representative row.

label: County tax rate — Hamilton OH % (repeats x7)
expected: Number input → patch.countyTax['hamilton-oh'] (value/100); applied to cash estimates by county. Representative of 7 county tax inputs.
notes: 7 inputs: taxHamOh/taxButOh/taxWarOh/taxCleOh/taxKenKy/taxBooKy/taxCamKy keyed by taxMap. One representative row.

label: 💾 Save All Estimate Settings
expected: _saveEstimateDefaultsV2: builds patch (rates/cost/markup/permits/tax), EstimateBuilderV2.updateSettings (localStorage), setDoc userSettings/{uid}.estimateSettingsV2; shows #v2save-msg + toast.

label: ↺ Reset to Defaults (estimates)
expected: _resetEstimateDefaultsV2: confirm() then EstimateBuilderV2.saveSettings(getDefaultSettings()) + reload form + toast.
notes: Guarded by confirm(); destructive of custom rate config but recoverable by re-entering.

label: ✨ Open V2 Builder →
expected: openEstimateV2Builder: opens the V2 Estimate Builder modal/view.

label: Daily OS · Focus Category
expected: Select read by dsSaveConfig → config.northStar.category (localStorage DS_NBD_CFG).

label: Daily OS · Deadline
expected: Date input → config.northStar.deadline in dsSaveConfig.

label: Daily Floor rows (label/target/unit/remove)
expected: JS-rendered floor editor rows (dsRenderFloors); each row has label/target/unit inputs + remove btn (dsRemoveFloor); collected into config.floors by dsSaveConfig.
notes: Up to 7 floors, dynamically rendered — one representative row.

label: + ADD FLOOR
expected: dsAddFloor (dashboard-actions.js:1014): appends a blank floor row to dsFloors and re-renders the editor.

label: Daily OS · Golden Goose Reward
expected: Text input → config.goose in dsSaveConfig (reward shown when all floors hit).

label: Show goose reward on daily tracker
expected: Checkbox → config.showGoose (!== false) in dsSaveConfig; controls reward visibility on the Daily Program tracker.

label: Daily Program theme swatch (per theme)
expected: JS-rendered program-theme grid (dsBuildThemeGrid); clicking sets dsSelectedTheme, persisted to localStorage DS_THEME_KEY on save.
notes: Separate from dashboard theme. Dynamically rendered — one representative row.

label: 💾 Save Daily Program Settings
expected: dsSaveConfig: requires ≥1 floor; writes config to localStorage DS_NBD_CFG + theme to DS_THEME_KEY; shows #ds-save-msg + toast.

label: ↺ Reset to Defaults (daily)
expected: dsResetDefaults: restores default floors + clears north-star/goose fields + resets program theme to nbd-original + re-renders.
notes: Clears the in-form config (not yet saved until Save clicked).

label: Open Daily Program ↗
expected: Opens /pro/daily-success/ in a new tab.

label: Legal Business Name (Company tab)
expected: Text input in CO_FIELDS; _saveCompanySettings writes to localStorage nbd_company_settings + userSettings/{uid}.company. Representative of 18 Company-tab inputs.
notes: CO_FIELDS x18: coName,coDba,coEin,coState,coPhone,coEmail,coAddress,coCity,coWebsite,coGbp,coLicOh,coLicKy,coGl,coWc,coGaf,coCerts,coTerritory,coRadius. One representative row; remaining captured as siblings below.

label: DBA / Trade Name
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings (nbd_company_settings + userSettings.company).

label: EIN
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: State of Incorporation
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: Business Phone (Company)
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: Business Email (Company)
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: Street Address
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: City, State ZIP
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: KY License #
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: General Liability Policy
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: Workers Comp Policy
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: GAF Certification
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: Other Certifications
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: Primary Service Area (counties)
expected: CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: Service Radius (miles)
expected: Number input, CO_FIELDS member → _saveCompanySettings.

label: 💾 Save Company Info
expected: _saveCompanySettings: collects 18 CO_FIELDS → localStorage nbd_company_settings + setDoc userSettings/{uid}.company merge; shows #co-save-msg + toast.

label: ↺ Reload (Company)
expected: _loadCompanySettings: re-reads from localStorage then Firestore userSettings.company (Firestore wins) and repopulates the 18 fields.

label: Company Profile · Letterhead Business Name
expected: Letterhead field read by _cpReadFormToProfile → _saveCompanyProfile → Firestore companyProfile/main; appears on every generated doc letterhead.
notes: Letterhead set: businessName/Phone/Email/Website/Address/License (cp_ prefix). One representative + siblings below.

label: Letterhead · Phone
expected: Letterhead field → companyProfile/main via _saveCompanyProfileSettings.

label: Letterhead · Email
expected: Letterhead field → companyProfile/main.

label: Letterhead · Mailing Address
expected: Letterhead field → companyProfile/main.

label: Letterhead · License # (footer disclaimer)
expected: Letterhead field → companyProfile/main; printed in doc footer disclaimer.

expected: Legal field (cancellationWindowText) → companyProfile/main; used inline in cancellation clauses on contracts/AOB/work-auth.
notes: _CP_LEGAL_FIELDS set (16 fields). Representative; key legal-text inputs/textareas listed below.

label: Legal · State Statute Reference
expected: Legal field → companyProfile/main.cancellationStatute.

expected: Textarea (3 rows) → companyProfile/main.cancellationContractClause (full contract clause boilerplate).

expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.cancellationProposalShort.

expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.changeOrderClause.

expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.changeOrderClauseShort.

label: Legal · Dispute Resolution Clause
expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.disputeResolutionClause.

label: Legal · Insurance Assignment Clause
expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.insuranceAssignmentClause (AOB boilerplate).

expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.entireAgreementClause.

label: Legal · Payment Terms (contract)
expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.paymentTermsContract.

label: Legal · Payment Terms (proposal)
expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.paymentTermsProposal.

expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.paymentMethodsNoCash (no-cash policy text).

label: Legal · Materials Warranty Disclaimer
expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.materialsWarrantyDisclaimer.

label: Legal · Proposal Validity Window (days)
expected: Number input → companyProfile/main.proposalValidityDays (parsed int, >0, fallback 30).

expected: Text input → companyProfile/main.latePaymentChargeText.

label: Legal · Limitation of Liability
expected: Textarea → companyProfile/main.limitationOfLiability.

label: Financing · Partner Name
expected: Marketing field → companyProfile/main.financePartner; shown on Financing Options docs.

label: Financing Tier 1 · APR/Months/Label/Badge (3 tiers x4)
expected: Financing-tier fields collected by _cpReadFormToProfile into companyProfile/main.financingTiers[0..2] {apr,months,label,badge,color}. Representative of 12 tier inputs.
notes: cp_tier{0,1,2}_{apr,months,label,badge} = 12 inputs across 3 tier rows — one representative row.

label: Marketing · Tagline
expected: Marketing field → companyProfile/main.tagline; shown on marketing docs.

label: Marketing · Service Area
expected: Marketing field → companyProfile/main.serviceArea.

label: Marketing · Service slot icon/name/desc (6 slots x3)
expected: Service-slot fields collected by _cpReadFormToProfile into companyProfile/main.services[] (blank rows skipped); shown on Company Intro/Door Hanger docs. Representative of 18 service inputs.

label: Marketing · Value-prop slot icon/title/desc (4 slots x3)
expected: Value-prop fields collected into companyProfile/main.valueProps[] (blank rows skipped); shown in 'Why Choose Us'. Representative of 12 value-prop inputs.

label: Code · Code Cycle
expected: Marketing/code field → companyProfile/main.codeCycle; printed on Insurance Inspection reports (lead-level overrides win).

label: Code · Jurisdictional Code
expected: Marketing/code field → companyProfile/main.codeJurisdiction.

label: 💾 Save Company Profile
expected: _saveCompanyProfileSettings: _cpReadFormToProfile overrides → window._saveCompanyProfile → Firestore companyProfile/main; shows #cp-save-msg + toast. New docs use these values.

label: ↺ Reload (Company Profile)
expected: _loadCompanyProfileSettings: refreshes window._companyProfile from Firestore and repopulates the form.

label: ↶ Reset to Defaults (Company Profile)
expected: _resetCompanyProfileSettings: confirm() then _cpPopulateFormFromProfile(NBD_COMPANY_PROFILE_DEFAULTS) — fields reset in-form only (must Save to persist).

label: Team · Invite Email Address
expected: Email input read by inviteTeamMember; must include '@' or it errors.

label: Team · Invite Role
expected: Role select (sales_rep/manager/viewer) read by inviteTeamMember → member doc.role.

label: Send Invite
expected: inviteTeamMember: setDoc companies/{uid} (owner doc, merge) + companies/{uid}/members/{email} {role,status:'invited',invitedBy}; clears email input + toast + reloads list.
notes: Creates a Firestore member record (intended to trigger an invite email). Drive only to confirm boundary.

label: Team member row (per invited member)
expected: JS-rendered member cards (loadTeamMembers) showing email + role + status badge.
notes: Display-only rows; one representative. Populated from companies/{uid}/members.

label: Access Code status badge
expected: Display-only ENABLED badge for the Access Code login method (state set elsewhere; no direct toggle here).
notes: Access methods are display-only status rows, not toggles, in this panel.

label: Refresh Session
expected: data-action reload: reloads the page to refresh the auth session.

label: 📥 Export Estimates (CSV) (Access)
expected: _exportEstimates: serializes estimates to CSV download.

label: 📥 Export Photos (ZIP)
expected: _exportPhotos (dashboard-bootstrap.module.js:3569): bundles photos into a ZIP download.

label: 📦 Export All My Data (JSON)
expected: _gdprExport: confirm() then calls Cloud Function exportMyData, opens returned signed URL in new tab; rate-limited 2/24h.

label: View All Plans
expected: Navigates to /pro/pricing.html.

label: Manage Subscription
expected: Links to /pro/pricing.html (Stripe customer-portal opener not yet wired; intentional placeholder per source comment).
notes: Known stub — openCustomerPortalSession not built; links to pricing page instead.

expected: JS-rendered plan cards (dashboard-billing-tab.js); display/compare plans.

label: View full pricing page →
expected: Text link to /pro/pricing.html full feature comparison.

expected: Radio name=notifMode value=critical read by _saveNotifSettings → data.mode (default critical, max 3-4/day).

expected: Radio notifMode=digest → data.mode='digest' (7am + 3pm briefings, no real-time).

expected: Radio notifMode=firehose → data.mode='firehose' (every event).

expected: Checkbox → data.triggers.notifHot.

expected: Checkbox → data.triggers.notifStorm.

expected: Checkbox → data.triggers.notifApproval (gates lead_review/estimate_approved).

expected: Checkbox → data.triggers.notifInbound.

expected: Checkbox → data.triggers.notifNeedsField (gates needs_field notifications).

expected: Checkbox → data.channels.chPush.

expected: Checkbox → data.channels.chEmail.

expected: _testNotif (dashboard-bootstrap.module.js:3492): fires a sample notification to verify the chosen channels/mode.

expected: openShortcutsPanel (ui.js:455): opens the keyboard-shortcuts overlay modal.
